query: SELECT id, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_in_time) as cin_ts, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_out_time) as cout_ts, worked_minutes, (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_out_time) - UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_in_time))/60 as calc_minutes FROM worker_daily_finance WHERE id = 210068;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT id, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_in_time) as cin_ts, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_out_time) as cout_ts, worked_minutes, (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_out_time) - UNIX_TIMESTAMP(check_in_time))/60 as calc_minutes FROM worker_daily_finance WHERE id = 210068;
